body: First of all, I previously asked as in https://github.com/link-assistant/calculator make automatic issue reporting. And it is not working, report issue button does not prefill the github issue. Also we need to make sure we fully support `moon orbits the Sun` case for all planets and moons, using real wikipedia data. I also want to see steps taken in reasoning, they should include interpretation of `moon`, `orbit`, `sun` as noun and verb phases intepreted to Q and P ids, as we do in https://github.com/link-assistant/human-language. With Q and P ids linkable to our browser in https://github.com/link-assistant/human-language. Also belief system should be part of separate context tab, where we must include prior belief about the God and prior belief about the the actual statement should be set in reasoning about the statement. Also i see no confirmations and refutations listed and so on. We need to double check everything is actually working, that we have automated tests as much as possible that working in CI/CD, so everything we see in browser is not MVP or fake data, but actually algorithms that do reason based on wikipedia/wikidata when it comes to real world facts/statements, when the expression is not direclty convertible to math or logic expression. Temporary reuse logic from https://github.com/link-assistant/calculator and https://github.com/link-foundation/relative-meta-logic, and also report issues there about how you propose for these projects to be reused in ours as libraries. - https://github.com/link-assistant/meta-expression/issues/1 - https://github.com/link-assistant/meta-expression/issues/5 Double check that all requirements from these are listed in REQUIREMENTS.md (note, that we don't use any graph terms in our codebase or docs, instead we should use https://github.com/link-foundation/meta-theory terms like links, references and so on). We should use in our code Rust + WebAssembly for real to access real data in Wikipedia (with smart caching as asked in these issues), and we should use as much of our associative (links related) dependencies (preferably in Rust) for the logic. Let's improve on our vision implementation as much we can in an a next step. We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).
title: We need to fix `moon orbits the Sun` expression issues to continue on our vision
